home.pageTitle: homeNshop - Multilingual Website Builder for Korean Export SMEs
home.metaDescription: Multilingual website builder for Korean SMEs preparing for global export. Create product catalogs in English, Chinese, Japanese, Spanish — no coding required.
home.heroTitle:
Build your own website
right now
home.heroSub:
Create a stunning website without any coding knowledge.
Enjoy diverse templates, mobile responsive design, and easy editing tools.
home.solutionTitle:
Multilingual Website Builder
for Korean Export SMEs
home.solutionDesc:
homeNshop is a multilingual website builder designed for Korean small and medium businesses preparing for global export.
Create product catalogs and company pages in buyer languages — English, Chinese, Spanish and more — without coding.
home.solutionSub: Not a complex global builder, not a domestic-only solution — a tool built specifically for export-focused SMEs.
home.solutionPoint1Desc: Create product info and company profiles in English, Chinese, Japanese, and Spanish at once. Overseas buyers can browse in their native language.
home.solutionPoint2Desc: Edit and publish without outsourcing. Update products instantly and add new languages anytime.
home.solutionPoint3Desc: Quickly build the multilingual website that KOTRA, trade associations, and export voucher program participants need.
home.featTitle: Everything you need to build a website
home.featSub: Anyone can easily create a professional website without complex setup.
home.feat1Desc: Choose from over 100 templates curated by industry and style. Start right away with a template you love.
home.feat2Desc: Optimized display on PC, tablet, and smartphone. Your mobile site is ready without any extra work.
home.feat3Desc: Place elements wherever you want without coding. An intuitive UI that anyone can use with ease.
home.feat4Desc: Run your website in Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese, and more. Attract global customers.
home.feat5Desc: Connect your own domain or publish instantly with a subdomain.
home.feat6Desc: Run your website on fast, stable servers. Choose from basic to premium plans as needed.
home.feat7Desc: Automatically optimized for Google and other search engines. Sitemap, meta tags, and structured data are built-in to maximize your search visibility.
home.feat8Desc: AI services like ChatGPT and Claude accurately recognize your site. Structured data designed for the AI era boosts your brand visibility.
home.stepsSub: Create your own website simply, without any complicated process.
home.step1Desc: Register with your email. Start without credit card information.
home.step2Desc: Select a template that fits your industry and style. It is ready for editing right away.
home.step3Desc: Customize text, images, and layout as you wish, then publish with a single click.
home.pricingSub: Choose what you need. Start with the basic plan and upgrade later.
home.ctaSub: No credit card, no complex setup. Sign up now and create your first website in 5 minutes.
home.footerAddress: 400 World Cup North-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Korea
home.geoTitle:
Get your site cited by
ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity
home.geoSub: Every site is auto-published with Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) built in. No extra setup — AI engines understand and cite your business the moment you publish.
home.geoFeat1Desc: Organization, Product, Article, FAQ, and BreadcrumbList schema.org JSON-LD is injected on every page so AI can extract product and company facts cleanly.
home.geoFeat2Desc: robots.txt explicitly allows 20+ AI crawlers — GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Applebot and more — so your site appears in AI answers.
home.geoFeat3Desc: Auto-generated llms.txt gives AI systems a curated plain-text summary of your site, helping them cite you accurately and in context.
home.geoFeat4Desc: hreflang links are generated for every ko/en/ja/zh/es page, and server-side rendering means AI crawlers read the content instantly — no JS needed.
home.geoFeat5Desc: OG and Twitter meta tags used for social previews and AI summaries are auto-optimized for every page, product, and post.
home.geoFeat6Desc: sitemap.xml for Google/Naver/Bing plus structured data for AI — the only approach that reaches both traditional search and AI search.
home.geoBullet1: Cited by ChatGPT with product and company info
home.geoBullet2: Shown as a source in Perplexity and Claude answers
home.geoBullet3: Structured data ready for Google AI Overview
home.geoBullet4: Compatible with Apple Intelligence and Meta AI

about.metaDescription: homeNshop is a website builder service that allows anyone to easily create their own website.
about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your website, made easy. homeNshop is here to help.
about.companyDesc: Since 2016, homeNshop has been providing website creation services for small businesses and entrepreneurs. We help anyone build a professional website without any coding knowledge.
about.missionDesc: Our goal is to ensure every business can have a professional online presence at an affordable price.
about.globalDesc: We support 6 languages including Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese, and Spanish, serving users worldwide.
about.infoAddressValue: 400 World Cup North-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Korea

pricing.metaDescription: Check out homeNshop pricing plans. From free to premium, choose what fits your needs.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose what you need. Start for free and upgrade anytime.
pricing.faq1Q: Can I create a website with the free plan?
pricing.faq1A: Yes, you can create a basic website with the free plan. However, the number of pages and templates is limited.
pricing.faq2Q: Can I get a refund after payment?
pricing.faq2A: You can request a refund within 7 days of payment. Please contact help@homenshop.com.
pricing.faq3Q: Will my data be preserved when I upgrade to Premium?
pricing.faq3A: Yes, all your data and settings will be preserved. Only additional features will be activated.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: These Terms of Service govern the use of the website creation service ("Service") provided by homeNshop Inc. ("Company") and define the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between the Company and its members.
terms.section2Content:
"Service" refers to all services provided by the Company, including website creation, hosting, and domain connection.
"Member" refers to a person who has registered for and uses the Service.
"Content" refers to all materials created and uploaded by members through the Service, including text, images, and videos.
terms.section3Content:
Members may create, edit, and publish websites using the Service.
The Company will do its best to provide stable service and may temporarily suspend service for system maintenance.
Members may not use the Service for illegal purposes.
terms.section4Content:
Members must comply with all relevant laws, these Terms, and usage guidelines.
Members may not collect or use others' personal information without authorization.
Members may not upload content that infringes on others' intellectual property rights.
terms.section5Content:
Service fees are determined by the Company's pricing policy.
Payments for paid services are processed through the payment methods provided by the Company.
Refunds may be requested within 7 days of payment.
terms.section6Content:
Members may stop using the Service and withdraw their membership at any time.
Upon withdrawal, all content created by the member will be deleted and cannot be recovered.
The Company may restrict or terminate a member's use of the Service if they violate these Terms.
terms.section7Content:
The Company is not liable for service interruptions caused by natural disasters or force majeure.
Members are responsible for the content they post through the Service.
Matters not specified in these Terms shall be governed by applicable laws.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content:
The Company collects the following personal information to provide its services:
- Required: Email address, name, password
- Optional: Phone number, company name
- Automatically collected: IP address, access time, browser information
privacy.section2Content:
The collected personal information is used for the following purposes:
- Member registration and management
- Service provision and operation
- Payment processing and billing
- Customer inquiry support
- Service improvement and statistical analysis
privacy.section3Content:
Personal information is destroyed immediately upon membership withdrawal.
However, information required by law will be retained for the required period:
- Contracts or subscription withdrawal: 5 years
- Payment records: 5 years
- Consumer complaint handling: 3 years
privacy.section4Content:
The Company does not provide members' personal information to third parties in principle.
Exceptions apply in the following cases:
- When the member has given prior consent
- When required by law
- When minimum information is provided to payment processors for payment processing
privacy.section5Content:
The Company takes the following measures to ensure the safety of personal information:
- Encrypted password storage (bcrypt)
- SSL/TLS encrypted communication
- Access permission management and restrictions
- Regular security audits
privacy.section6Content:
Members may view, modify, or delete their personal information at any time.
Members may withdraw their consent to the processing of personal information.
For inquiries regarding personal information, please contact help@homenshop.com.
privacy.section7Content:
Name: Inchul Choi
Position: CEO
Email: help@homenshop.com

This policy is effective from March 1, 2026.
